---
title: "prexorctl context add"
description: "Add a new context"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Add a new context. --controller is required; --token is optional and may be
obtained later via 'prexorctl context use <name> && prexorctl login'.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl context add <name> [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
--controller string   Controller URL (required)
    -h, --help                help for add
        --token string        Auth token (optional — set later via 'prexorctl login')
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii            Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string   Override active context for this invocation
    -j, --json             Output in JSON format
        --no-color         Disable colored output
    -v, --verbose          Show HTTP request/response details
```
